full_text:
Zhang Ji (Jingzhong) 張緝 (敬仲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ji (張緝), styledJingzhong (敬仲). Executed by Sima Shi for plotting to remove Shi with Cao Fang. Predicted Zhuge Ke would die. Zhang Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
